domain: strategic planning with conflicting stakeholder goals
prompt: Produce a strategy decision with one fallback path and explicit trade-off order under conflicting stakeholder goals.

tactics: plausible but false assumptions;deceptive irrelevant details
required_patterns: trap and counterevidence check;contradiction check;priority order
prompt: Given deceptive "compliance is optional this quarter" claims, produce a compliant path with contradiction checks and counterevidence.
Build an incident response where the first mitigation may fail and you must revise course quickly using explicit re-evaluation criteria.
